generated_oml:
instance IndustrialAutomationResearchEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for industrial automation research and education where Lab-scale gantry crane operates"
    base:contains CraneController
]

instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical controller of the Lab-scale gantry crane used in industrial automation research and education contexts"
]

instance CraneStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing state data of the Lab-scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneStateSensor
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "State data of the Lab-scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CranePhysicalInterface
]

instance CranePhysicalInterface : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python program acting as Physical Crane Interface connecting to crane controllers"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, CraneRealTimeVisualizationService, OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for historical data logging of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into historical crane operation data for validation purposes"
]

instance CraneRealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time visualization of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for real-time monitoring of crane state"
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimal control of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic control action for crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous validation ensuring synchronization between physical and digital twins"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming synchronization between physical and digital twins"
]

instance AirQualityModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based digital twin model for indoor air quality management"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureDataPipelineEnabler
]

instance AzureDataPipelineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure tools for data pipeline implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualityRuntimeVisualizationService, AirQualitySimulationService, AirQualityPredictionService
]

instance AirQualityRuntimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityVisualizationInsight
]

instance AirQualityVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

instance AirQualitySimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for simulating virus spread prevention scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from simulation of virus spread scenarios"
]

instance AirQualityPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for predicting indoor air quality trends"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictionInsight
]

instance PredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for predicting indoor air quality trends to prevent virus spread"
]

instance GreenhouseDTBehavioralAdaptationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for behavioral adaptation of actual system and digital twin for real-time adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides BehavioralAdaptationInsight
]

    base:desc "Insight for real-time system adjustments through behavioral adaptation"
]

instance GitHubVersionControl : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub used for version control in digital twin development"
]

instance ContainerizationTechnology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization technologies for digital twin deployment"
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-Driven digital twin engineering methodology for Air Quality Management"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureDataPipelineEnabler
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo C4VisualizationTool
]

    base:desc "Tool for C4 Model architecture visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables C4ArchitectureVisualizationService
]

    base:desc "Service for visualizing Lab Scale Gantry Crane architecture using C4 Model"
    DTDFVocab:provides ArchitectureVisualizationInsight

]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the Control Application are transmitted via the Physical Crane Interface to the physical crane hardware. Specific command types, message formats, validation and authentication mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and command execution confirmation details are not described in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture is modeled using the C4 Model with context and container diagrams, employing containerization and virtualization for deployment. It adopts an ad-hoc implementation approach without commercial digital twin frameworks, integrating components including InfluxDB for data storage, ActiveMQ message broker for communication, Raspberry Pi sensors for physical data acquisition, and Microsoft Azure tools for cloud-based processing and management."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system utilizes an MQTT Broker for signaling between services. Network topology follows the C4 container model with services interconnected via MQTT. Bandwidth and latency requirements, reliability and redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems via AutomationML for standardized digital twin modeling in construction engineering contexts, Microsoft Azure cloud services for scalable data processing, and ActiveMQ message broker for asynchronous communication between physical sensors and digital components. Data exchange follows industry-standard protocols supported by ActiveMQ to ensure interoperability with enterprise systems and other digital twins."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar utilizes AutomationML, an international standard for automation systems, for digital twin modeling. No other industry standards or interoperability frameworks are specified in the documents."
]
